name: Linen Quilted Easter Basket Green Bunny Printing - Threshold™
description:
Add a cute touch of storage to your festive home with this Linen Quilted Bunny Printing Basket from Threshold™. Made from recycled polyester fabric with allover bunny print, this round quilted basket is a perfect pick for storing a variety of household essentials during the Easter season and beyond. Plus, the basket features a top handle that make it easy to carry from room to room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
